mapper.select: SELECT * FROM export_tasks WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM export_tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY requested_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_tasks (user_id, export_type, file_format, status, date_from, date_to, file_name, file_url, error_message, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{exportType}, #{fileFormat}, #{status}, #{dateFrom}, #{dateTo}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{errorMessage}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE export_tasks
status = #{status}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE export_tasks SET status = 'expired', updated_at = NOW() WHERE expires_at < #{expiresBefore} AND status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'success') AND deleted_at IS NULL
